case_title: SAN FRANCISCO INT CHEESE IMPORTS VS MARKET ROASTERY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO INT CHEESE IMPORTS AS TO DEFENDANT MARKET ROASTERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARKET ROASTERY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO INT CHEESE IMPORTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKET ROASTERY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,538.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MARKET ROASTERY HEARING SET FOR AUG-09-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-09-1991, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARKET ROASTERY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
